summary: Sir, this is a compact L-bracket concept for a garden bench bracket, preserving the 110 mm hole spacing and 30 mm plate width, with an 8 mm thickness and a 12 mm bend radius. I’ve added a simple drain slot path and kept the motif suggestion restrained, so it looks intentional rather than as though a committee of ravens discovered decorative tooling.
fit_checks: Confirm hole spacing on the Garden bench bracket.
Check fastener clearance and wrench access.
Verify drain path does not weaken the load path.
export_detail: Exported a simple fit-check STL using 110.00 x 30.00 x 8.00 mm derived from the supplied dimensions.
